job.title: & We're Hiring | MERN Stack Developer
job.description:
& We're Hiring | MERN Stack Developer
Savo Technologies is looking for a passionate and skilled MERN Stack Developer to
join our growing development team.
Position: MERN Stack Developer
Experience Required: Minimum 1 Year
Salary: Up to 750,000 per month
Work Mode: Work From Office
Working Days: Monday to Friday
° Location: Vijay Nagar, Indore
M Skills Required:
• MongoDB
• Express js
• React.js
• Node.js
• REST APIs
• JavaScript / ES6
• Git & GitHub Basics
@ Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain scalable web applications
• Build responsive and user-friendly interfaces using React.js
• Create secure backend APIs with Node.js & Express.js
• Manage and optimize MongoDB databases
• Collaborate with designers and developers to deliver high-quality solutions
What We Offer:
• Friendly and Professional Work Environment
• Career Growth Opportunities
• Hands-on Learning & Development
• Exposure to Real Client Projects
• Competitive Salary Package
Interested candidates can send their resume to: hr@savotechnologies.com
E WhatsApp Resume: +91 7898852345
